title: ApiObservation
description: A discovered shadow API from traffic observation.

name.description: Output only. Resource name of the observation.

serverIps.description: Server IP addresses serving the API.

sourceLocations.description: Locations where the API was observed.

apiOperationCount.description: Number of operations discovered in this API.

lastEventDetectedTime.description: Time of the last observed event.

firstEventDetectedTime.description: Time of the first observed event.

createTime.description: Output only. Time the observation was created.

updateTime.description: Output only. Time the observation was last updated.
